common.generic_error: Operation failed, please try again later.

webhook.guru_sync_complete: ✅ 13F sync complete: {total} gurus, synced {synced}, skipped {skipped}, errors {errors}.

scan.in_progress: Scan in progress, please try again later.
scan.started: Scan started, results will be sent via Telegram.
scan.alert_header: 🔔 Folio Scan — Signal Changes Detected 🌡️ Market: {market_status} · F&G: {fg_label}
scan.deep_value_alert: 💎 {ticker} DEEP VALUE Bias {bias}% · RSI {rsi} → Extreme low — dual confirmation, high-conviction entry zone
scan.oversold_alert: 📉 {ticker} OVERSOLD Bias {bias}% · RSI {rsi} → Price at extreme low — await momentum confirmation
scan.contrarian_buy_alert: 🟢 {ticker} CONTRARIAN BUY RSI {rsi} · Bias {bias}% → Momentum oversold — watch for price reversal
scan.approaching_buy_alert: 🎯 {ticker} APPROACHING BUY RSI {rsi} · Bias {bias}% · MA200 dev {bias_200}% → Nearing buy zone — prepare entry plan
scan.overheated_alert: 🔥 {ticker} OVERHEATED Bias {bias}% · RSI {rsi} → Both indicators extended — trim or avoid adding
scan.caution_high_alert: ⚠️ {ticker} CAUTION HIGH Bias {bias}% · RSI {rsi} → Single indicator overheating — reduce new positions
scan.weakening_alert: 🔻 {ticker} WEAKENING Bias {bias}% · RSI {rsi} → Early weakness detected — monitor closely
scan.rogue_wave_alert: 🌊 {ticker} ROGUE WAVE Bias {bias}% (P{percentile}) · Vol {vol_ratio}x → Late-stage surge — no leveraged chasing

notification.all_normal: ✅ All Clear — No active signals this week.

formatter.withdrawal_no_holdings: ⚠️ No holdings available for withdrawal calculation.
formatter.moat_stable: Moat stable: gross margin {current}% vs prior year {previous}% ({sign}{change} pp)
formatter.moat_deteriorating: Moat deteriorating: gross margin {current}% → prior year {previous}% (down {change} pp)

rebalance.no_profile: Investment profile not configured. Please set up your portfolio target first.
rebalance.no_holdings: No holdings entered, please add assets first.
rebalance.xray_warning: ⚠️ X-Ray Warning: {symbol} direct holding {direct_pct:.1f}%, plus indirect ETF exposure ({sources}), total exposure {total_pct:.1f}%, exceeding single stock risk threshold {threshold:.0f}%.
rebalance.fx_risk_high: 🔴 Detected sharp FX volatility. Currency risk is HIGH. Recommend reviewing foreign currency positions immediately.
rebalance.fx_risk_medium: 🟡 Detected recent FX volatility (5-day). Currency risk is MEDIUM. Continue monitoring FX trends.
rebalance.fx_risk_low: 🟢 Recent FX changes stable. Currency risk is LOW.
rebalance.foreign_cash_warning: 💵 {pct:.1f}% of your cash is in foreign currency. Largest foreign cash: {currency} (approx. {value:,.0f} {home}), directly impacted by FX movements.
rebalance.withdrawal_insufficient: ⚠️ No holdings entered, cannot calculate withdrawal plan.
rebalance.withdrawal_success: ✅ Withdrawal plan generated with {count} sell recommendations.
rebalance.advice_zero: ⚠️ Total portfolio value is zero. Unable to calculate allocation.
rebalance.advice_ok: ✅ All categories are within target range. No rebalancing needed.

fx_watch.rec_should_alert_both: 💡 Consider exchanging {base} → {quote} — near high + {consec} consecutive rises
fx_watch.rec_near_high_disabled: 💡 Near recent high but consecutive momentum insufficient — observe
fx_watch.rec_consec_disabled: 💡 Rising consistently but not near high — wait
fx_watch.rec_no_signal: 💡 No exchange signal at this time
fx_watch.rec_disabled: 💡 Monitoring disabled — enable at least one alert condition
fx_watch.rea_should_alert_high: 📊 {pair} near {high_days}-day high ({high:.4f}) — good time to exchange
fx_watch.rea_near_high_disabled: 📊 Near {high_days}-day high but only {consec} consecutive days (threshold: {consec_threshold}d)
fx_watch.rea_consec_disabled: 📊 {consec} consecutive days but not near {high_days}-day high — may still rise
fx_watch.rea_no_signal: 📊 Not near recent high, only {consec} consecutive rising days
fx_watch.rea_disabled: 📊 Enable near-high or consecutive-rise alerts to receive notifications
fx_watch.rea_no_data: 📊 Not enough historical data for this pair

stress_test.panic_intro: 🔴 Portfolio will lose 30%+ in extreme crash, entering panic zone.
stress_test.advice_beta_high: • Portfolio Beta >= 1.5, highly aggressive. Consider adding low-volatility assets (bonds, cash) to reduce risk exposure.
stress_test.advice_beta_moderate: • Portfolio Beta >= 1.2, moderately aggressive. Recommend partial profit-taking on high-Beta positions.
stress_test.advice_beta_low: • Portfolio Beta < 1.2, but still monitor single-stock concentration risk.
stress_test.advice_emergency_fund: • Ensure emergency fund is sufficient (at least 6 months living expenses).
stress_test.advice_leverage: • If using leverage or margin, maintain safety buffer to avoid forced liquidation.
stress_test.advice_thesis_broken: • Review holdings for Thesis Broken signals, prioritize reducing deteriorating positions.
stress_test.advice_warning: ⚠️ Stress test is scenario modeling only, actual markets may be more extreme. Invest with caution.
stress_test.disclaimer: ⚠️ This is a simplified linear CAPM model. In actual crashes, correlations approach 1 and liquidity dries up, potentially causing larger losses. This simulation is for reference only and does not constitute investment advice.

withdrawal.tax_reason: 📉 Unrealized loss position, selling enables Tax-Loss Harvesting to offset capital gains tax.
withdrawal.liquidity_high_reason: {icon} {category} high liquidity, prioritize for withdrawal to preserve compounding core assets.
